THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, RONALD P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MET-NET COMMUNICATIONS, INC. $4,125.88 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,210.88, THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR THE CLAIMED COSTS AND EXPENSES. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY HAS REIMBURSED PLAINTIFF FOR THE SPECIFIED EXPENSES, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR SUCH ANY PAYMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
